purpose: Soft marimba pluck when Gefen taps a flower to count it
purpose_he: צליל רך כשגפן לוחצת על פרח כדי לספור אותו
prompt_for_elevenlabs: A very soft gentle warm marimba pluck for a Hebrew children's educational counting app, single wooden tone struck softly, rounded attack, short warm resonant decay, like touching a soft wooden xylophone key, friendly and responsive, no harsh attack, no sharp highs, very short under one second.
script_entry: ("ui_flower_tap_1.mp3", "A very soft gentle warm marimba pluck for a Hebrew children's counting app, single low C tone, rounded attack, short warm decay, friendly and responsive, no harsh attack, no sharp highs.", 0.5)
